feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Default Asset Useful Life T-code OAYZ is overwritten when create asset via T-code AS01
entry.content:
In OAYZ configuration for CHD FSG my useful life and Dep key is configured as 0,0 and in OABD and OABC we have removed the identical tick from area 72 when we create a new asset in AS01 when we go to dep area tab it has 0 UFL but as we scroll down or save it , it fetches the value of area 81 which has UFL 15 years.

 

We have also changed the screen layout in OYAZ but it still did not reoslve the isssue kindly suggest us how to keep it stable UFL should be 0 as the confiuguration at OAYZ is 0

entry.title: UK DIrect debit - create and submit AUDDIS files via MBC
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We would like to get your help here. We are submitting PAIN.008.001.02 Direct debit collection files to our UK company code 0201. However for specific customers we are getting rejections. We did investigations and it turned out that the GB BACS DIRECT Debit process has two pillar: 1) Submitting BACS Auddis files - to authorize the customers for the payment collection 2) Sending the payment files with the open items. For those customers - where we had the BACS Auddis authorization process covered by the earlier process we had via a third party provider - there it works. However we should have the process to enable new customers in the process. 

Checking in SAP notes they say that this is feasiable however it was not clear - what configuration steps we need or how we can enable that. Thanks for your help here. 

Regards, 

Veronika

entry.title: Slide Tile not showing slides on Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi,

A custom UI5 tile that consists of a GenericTile inside a SlideTile is not showing the slider functionality on the launchpad. It is displayed as a mere anchor that, when clicked, will display the slider correctly on a seperate page. Please help so the slidetile will display slides on the launchpad.

entry.title: Only standard catalog at tile creation phase in tile Manage KPI & Reports
entry.content: When I create a tile using the tile "Manage Kpi and Reports", only standard catalog are proposed. However I've understood that the best practice is to create custom application in custom catalogs. We check the authorisations and it's ok. We also have custom catalogs which could be used before the upgrade to S4HANA 2023.

entry.title: how to configure the RHD Fiori through Webdispatcher.
entry.content:
The Fiori URLs for the RHP and RHQ systems are working correctly through the Web Dispatcher.
 Our requirement is to access the RHD Fiori through Webdispatcher.

so please suggest how we can do?

entry.title: J3RFLVMOBVED Report
entry.content:
We need values for the respective fields which are coming in this standard report but here in output we are not getting any values.

J3RFLVMOBVEDH is displaying the records but some fields (quantity, value, opening balance, closing balance, etc.) are blank or zero, the issue is usually related to data, report limitations, or missing SAP corrections rather than the report layout itself

entry.title: subcontracting charges are not picking based on po
entry.content:
Hi sir,

 

SFG codes, Sub-contract charges are not capturing as per actual PO rate. Please do the needful. 

Thanks & regards,

Maheswari Podeddula

entry.title: S/4HANA RISE – MIGO movement types 311 and 542 do not allow stock type/status change
entry.content:
After migrating from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA RISE, we observed a change in the behavior of movement types 311 and 542 in transaction MIGO.

In our previous ECC system, when posting movement types 311 and 542, it was possible to change the stock type/status (for example, Unrestricted Use, Quality Inspection, or Blocked Stock) within the same goods movement.

In the S/4HANA RISE system, the Stock Type/Status field is no longer editable (display only). As a result, users are unable to perform the transfer and stock status change in a single posting.

entry.title: deletion task /operation in pm order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to implement a customization within the PM module of SAP S/4HANA, but I haven't been able to identify the right point to make this change.

I want to remove a specific operation from the task list when a planned maintenance order is being created. How can I achieve this using standard functionality?

Best regards,

entry.title: Duplicate Apps appear on BWZ
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have 2 approval Apps built, one for PR/PO approval and another for Time and Attendence approval.

Both Apps are included in a technical catalog, which is assigned to a ICT role, then federated to BWZ. However, it appears duplicate Apps are showing in BWZ. 

Please see the details in the attached file. 

Please kindly investigate. 

Thanks.

Kathleen

entry.title: Sales order Approval notification in my inbox: How to display and see which line item is rejected
entry.content: Sales order Approval notification: How to display and see which line item is rejected

entry.title: SI Check SI11 (์Note 2268085) for Compatibility Pack: how to resolve for active MRP systems?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Running Simplification Item Check for S/4HANA conversion,
we got:


SI11: Logistics_PP – S4TWL - MRP in HANA – Note 2268085
Result: "Check performed, item is probably relevant. Check business impact note."

What we have verified so far, per Note 2268085:

- CP ID 443 (MRP Lists – MD05/MD06):
Business users confirmed they have never used MD05/MD06 and have
no authorization for these transactions.

- CP ID 450 (Forecast-Based Planning – MRP type VV):
Confirmed no material in any plant uses MRP type VV.

One point we are unsure about:

- Our custom code calls FM MD_STOCK_REQUIREMENTS_LIST_API, which reads
table MDKP. Does this count as CP 443 exposure?
My understanding: this FM serves the stock/requirements list (MD04),
NOT the MRP list (MD05/MD06) — and Note 2268085 itself names the
stock/requirements list as the replacement for MRP lists.
So it should be outside CP 443 scope. Is this correct?

Questions:

1. Since the system actively uses MRP, is it correct that SI11 will always
stay "probably relevant" and can never become "not relevant" by design?

2. What additional steps are expected to formally close this item?
e.g. delete old MRP lists via MD08, set MRP list creation indicator = 3
in all planning variants, ATC clean result with S4HANA_READINESS variant?

3. Is disposition documentation (business impact reviewed + evidence)
the accepted way to close SI11 for the conversion, or is anything
else required?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to put depreciation end date field in valuation tab of asset master data in saps4hana
entry.content: How to put depreciation end date field in valuation tab of asset master data in saps4hana

entry.title: Clarification Required on SAP API Policy Changes and Impact Assessment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We would like to understand the recent changes related to the SAP API policy and assess any potential impact on our landscape.

Could you please help us with the following:

What are the changes introduced in the new SAP API policy?
Which types of APIs are affected by these changes?
How can we identify the APIs currently being used in our SAP landscape?
Will the new API policy have any impact on our existing APIs or system integrations?
Are there any actions, configuration changes, or migrations required from our side to ensure continued support and compliance?
Please share any relevant SAP Notes or documentation related to this API policy change.

Your guidance will help us evaluate the impact on our existing environment and plan any necessary actions.

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,
SAP Basis Team

entry.title: Generate Warehouse Tasks
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you help us with the following theme, please?

We have a periodic job, program /SCWM/R_DLV_PDO_CREATE_WT (execution variant “FLUXO_CHAO_TDS”), the objective is to generate Warehouse Tasks for a specific delivery type(ZTRA). Our problem is with the sequence of selection of the deliveries(it doesn’t follows a number or date sequence of the deliveries), also it generates tasks in a non-arbitrary logic.

 

For example, he have 10 deliveries(from 1 to 10, all of them have the same dat), the program generates tasks for delivery 2, then goes to delivery 5, 8, then delivery , which means it doesn’t take a sequence. Also the tasks aren’t generated in the sequence of the delivery, it generates some tasks for delivery 2(doesn’t generates tasks for all the quantity), then goes for delivery 5(again generates tasks, but not for all the quantity), then goes to delivery 8(does the same thing),

For more details can you check the attached word document.

Thank you, best regards.

Diana Arana

entry.title: SAP Fiori Tile F0842A Manage Purchase Order - Notification issue
entry.content:
An issue has been identified in SAP Fiori Tile F0842A "Manage Purchase Order". When a user clicks on a notification, the application redirects them to the notifications list instead of opening the specific item associated with the selected notification.

The expected result is : the user should be redirected directly to the notification they clicked on.

entry.title: Configuration Guidance for Multi-Level Method and Depreciation Key
entry.content:
We have a requirement to configure a multi-level depreciation method with period-based depreciation rates as outlined below

Year 1

  • Periods 0–3: 15% each
  • Periods 4–9: 1.67% each
  • Periods 10–12: 1.66% each

Year 2 = 25%

Year 3 = 15%

Could you please advise on the required SAP configuration to achieve this setup,

  • Multi-Level Method configuration
  • Base Method settings
  • Declining/Ordinary Depreciation Method
  • Period Control Method
  • Dep Key configuration

entry.title: Profile icon on Fiori Screen not working for Macbook (Safari browser)
entry.content: Post version upgrade, users using Macbook and Safari browser are unable to operate the "Profile" icon. It is no longer clicable.

entry.title: The price is not being picked up in the PO from the Info Record.
entry.content: The price is not being picked up in the PO from the Info Record. I have maintained the price in the Info Record, and while creating the PO, the system is not fetching the price. I also tried "Carry Out New Pricing", but the issue still persists.

entry.title: ABAWによりマイナス簿価
entry.content:
サポート　ご担当者　様

減損をして償却費計上をすると簿価がマイナスになる場合があります。

本来、償却費はメモ値の1円でストップするのが会計上(J-GAAP、IFRSなど)のリーガル要件と認識しております。

よろしくお願いいたします。
